prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle product mockup photo of a black iPhone lying diagonally on a warm wooden desk in golden sunlight, shot from above at a slight angle with shallow depth of field. The phone displays an iOS App Store app detail page in dark mode for Dev Partner: Meeting Notes, with a cute white app icon showing a small hand-drawn duck/chick mascot, a blue Open button, and the subtitle Transcripts, tasks, daily plan. The top iPhone status bar shows 11:20, cellular/Wi‑Fi/battery icons, and a dynamic island; include a back chevron at top left and share icon at top right. The app information row must contain exactly 4 discrete stats: 1 rating showing 5.0 with five stars, age rating 4+ Years, category Productivity with a paper-plane style icon, and developer Mir md habibulla with a small profile icon. Below, show a What's New section with Version 1.2.0, a short update paragraph about introducing Recap to quickly review meetings, notes, tasks, and follow-ups, plus a small “1w ago” label and “more” link. Under that, show a Preview heading and exactly 2 visible preview cards: the left card is a white mobile screenshot titled “Meeting 4/14/2026, 4:32:15PM” with an audio waveform, play controls, a large circular play button, and bottom tabs; the right card is partially visible and titled “Record Better Meetings” with a phone screenshot. At the bottom of the App Store screen show exactly 4 navigation tabs labeled Today, Games, Apps, and Arcade, plus a floating blue search button near the lower right. Surroundings: blurred green plant in the upper left background, a partial silver laptop edge at lower right, strong diagonal sunlight and wood grain shadows across the table, premium candid tech photography, high detail, natural reflections on the phone glass, no hands, no extra devices, no watermark.
